reviews.review_title: Fun game, extremely boring and difficult
reviews.review_description: This game is a very fun game if you get to play it enough, but it doesn’t really have any exiting things… trying to survive the first few nights is quite difficult too. I’d love to give this game four stars, though there are a lot of things that impede the fun. Overall, wouldn’t recommend spending this much money on it; it’s not worth buying for, in my opinion.

This is a great game, it could become a big thing! I just find the gameplay would be better if the graphic were even just a little smoother. Other than that this game is fun, not really any bugs or glitching, also in free shooter mode you should be able to use building blocks, etc. same with building mode there should be guns and zombies and a setting to turn zombies off or on

Update! The developers actually ￼listen to your ideas on discord and are active in trying to help! Still a 5 star game!

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you so much for the kind words and thoughtful feedback! 🙏 We're really glad you're enjoying Survivoid and see its potential — that means a lot to us.

Great news: we’ve just rolled out a complete graphics engine overhaul! 🎉 Textures are now smoother and more stable thanks to new smarter texture filtering, which should directly address your comment about visual quality. Let us know how it feels now — we’d love your thoughts!

And you're totally right about gameplay flexibility — we've already got plans to merge features across modes, including using building blocks in Free Shooter and adding more settings like toggling zombies. It's on our radar, and your feedback helps us prioritize.

Thanks again for playing and for helping shape the future of the game! 💚

reviews.review_description: This game is really good and what I've always wanted but I have a suggestion maybe add like a realism mode it could be a toggle for all gamemodes. The thing it will add is like slower movement (able to toggle walk and run) running will be slower and walking is just.. walking running will use more stamina and so will jumping and jumping will be lowered to be a one block tall jump or two. That would be all this game needs for it to be the best it can. Also fix the block it detection like make it that you have to swing to hit the block not lightly touch it. Thanks 👋

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the feedback — we’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the game! The idea of a realism mode is a great suggestion and aligns perfectly with what many players looking for a more immersive experience might enjoy. It’s definitely something we’ll consider as an option inside the game, possibly alongside adjustments like slower zombie movement to match the more grounded gameplay style.
As for block hit detection, that improvement is already in progress and will be part of our next update, which is just a few days away. This update will also include a revamped crafting interface for a smoother user experience.
We’re constantly working to improve the game and grow our community. Feel free to join us on Discord to share more ideas, get sneak peeks, and connect with other players: https://discord.gg/F9w3RSzfAU
Thanks again for playing and taking the time to share your thoughts — it really helps shape the future of the game!

reviews.review_title: One of the Best VR Survival Experiences
reviews.review_description:
Survivoid is a surprisingly immersive and well-crafted survival game. It combines the charm of block-style graphics with genuinely tense and strategic gameplay. You really feel the pressure when scavenging for supplies, building shelter, and trying to survive the night. The atmosphere is spot-on — especially during those pitch-black moments when every sound matters.

I loved how intuitive the mechanics feel in VR. The item interaction, exploration, and combat all work smoothly. The different modes — Survival, Creative, and Free-Shooter — make the game very versatile, and each one adds something unique to the experience.

It’s clear that a lot of thought went into this game, and it already feels like a solid foundation for something even bigger. I find myself wondering: what are my next steps? Base-building? Zombie hunting?

If you’re into survival games and want something fresh and immersive in VR, Survivoid is absolutely worth your time.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review — we're really glad Survivoid gave you that immersive and strategic survival experience you were looking for! Blending the charm of block-style visuals with meaningful gameplay has been a key focus, so it's awesome to hear it paid off.
We’re especially happy that the VR mechanics felt smooth and intuitive, and that you enjoyed the variety each game mode brings. As for what’s next —we’ve got plenty more surprises coming to support exactly that kind of gameplay. The foundation is just the beginning, and with players like you helping to shape the future, we’re confident Survivoid will only get better.
Thanks again for playing and sharing your thoughts! Feel free to join our Discord to connect with other players and stay up to date: https://discord.gg/F9w3RSzfAU

reviews.review_description: The first day is always quite literally impossible. If you could add a peace-time (for example first 5 days ingame is peacetime with no zombies) or a setting/and or mode where zombies cannot break blocks.
